properties.name: Bush Dome Reservoir
properties.operator: Federal Helium Reserve legacy / private successors
properties.description: Underground geological reservoir in the Cliffside Gas Field historically used to store federally owned helium.
properties.sourceName: Texas State Historical Association - Bush Dome Reservoir and Cliffside Field Terminal
properties.notes: Representative point; verify lease/facility boundary before using for operational decisions.

properties.name: Cliffside Field Terminal / Cliffside Gas Plant
properties.operator: Federal Helium System legacy / private successor
properties.description: Facility associated with the Federal Helium Reserve, helium quality testing, enrichment, and withdrawal from Bush Dome.
properties.sourceName: U.S. General Services Administration - Sale of Federal Helium System Assets
properties.notes: Representative point; verify lease/facility boundary before using for operational decisions.

properties.name: Amarillo Helium Plant
properties.description: Historic helium plant west of Amarillo that supplied much of the world's helium before World War II.
properties.sourceName: Texas Historical Commission - Amarillo Helium Plant
properties.notes: Representative point; verify lease/facility boundary before using for operational decisions.

properties.name: Panhandle Helium-Bearing Gas Field Area
properties.operator: Multiple gas operators / historical federal program
properties.description: Regional point for helium-bearing Panhandle natural gas resources that supported the federal helium program.
properties.sourceName: Texas State Historical Association - Bush Dome Reservoir and Cliffside Field Terminal
properties.notes: Regional field centroid, not a single facility.
